provenance_defaults.source: APF22 (facts, cited) — Modification of oral formulation

records.rationale: crushing destroys the modified-release matrix, causing dose dumping and overdose risk
records.alternative: use an immediate-release liquid under prescriber direction

records.rationale: modified-release matrix; crushing causes dose dumping
controlled-release; crushing causes rapid absorption and hypotension
enteric coating protects the acid-labile drug from gastric degradation
records.alternative: use an orally disintegrating or IV form where available

records.rationale: crushing removes the gastro-protective enteric coating (increased GI irritation); acceptable if clinically necessary
